/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libdobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dobot_interface/action/detail/dds_fastrtps/pose_ptp__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/dobot_interface/srv/detail/dds_fastrtps/pick_and_place__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/kilted/lib:/home/dobot/Documents/DetectX/DetectX_Dobot/build/dobot_interface: /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so libdobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.3.3 /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
